key.name: module-no-overview
key.description: Disables the overview at startup

key.name: module-pip-on-top
key.description: Keeps Picture-in-Picture windows always on top

key.name: module-theme-changer
key.description: Monitors and synchronizes GNOME color scheme

key.name: module-dock
key.description: Custom dock with auto-hide and intellihide features

key.name: module-volume-mixer
key.description: Per-application volume control in Quick Settings

key.name: module-xwayland-indicator
key.description: Shows an X11 badge on XWayland apps in the Alt+Tab switcher

key.name: module-privacy
key.description: Enables screen sharing privacy features

key.name: privacy-dnd-on-share
key.description: Automatically enables Do Not Disturb mode when screen sharing

key.name: module-icon-weave
key.description: Automatically fixes missing app icons using an in-memory approach (no files written)

key.name: module-app-search-tooltip
key.description: Shows app name tooltip on hover in the overview search results

key.name: privacy-panel
key.description: Hides panel content during screen sharing; reveals on hover

key.name: dock-always-show
key.description: Keep the dock permanently visible and reserve screen space so windows never overlap it

key.name: module-auto-theme-switcher
key.description: Automatically switches between light and dark theme based on configured times

key.name: auto-theme-switcher-light-hours
key.description: Hour of day to switch to light theme (0-23)

key.name: auto-theme-switcher-light-minutes
key.description: Minute of hour to switch to light theme (0-59)

key.name: auto-theme-switcher-dark-hours
key.description: Hour of day to switch to dark theme (0-23)

key.name: auto-theme-switcher-dark-minutes
key.description: Minute of hour to switch to dark theme (0-59)

key.name: module-bluetooth-menu
key.description: Enhances the Bluetooth Quick Settings panel with battery levels and animated icons

key.name: module-meeting-clock
key.description: Shows upcoming calendar events next to the clock

key.name: module-weather-clock
key.description: Shows GNOME Weather next to the clock

key.name: weather-clock-after-clock
key.summary: Show Weather Clock after the clock
key.description: Place the weather indicator after the clock instead of before it

key.name: meeting-clock-alerts-enabled
key.description: Show a notification when a meeting is about to start

key.name: meeting-clock-alert-minutes-before
key.description: Minutes before a meeting starts to show the alert

key.name: meeting-clock-snooze-minutes
key.description: Minutes to wait before showing a snoozed alert again

key.name: meeting-clock-alert-events-without-link
key.description: Show Meeting Clock alerts for calendar events that do not include a join link

key.name: meeting-clock-panel-reveal-interval-minutes
key.description: Minutes between automatic Meeting Clock slide reveals in the panel

key.name: meeting-clock-panel-lookahead-minutes
key.description: Maximum minutes before an event starts for it to appear in the panel clock

key.name: meeting-clock-exclude-all-day-events
key.summary: Hide all-day events in Meeting Clock
key.description: Exclude all-day events from the clock and alerts

key.name: module-tray-icons
key.description: Shows SNI and background app icons in the panel

key.name: tray-icons-limit
key.description: Number of icons shown before the expand chevron appears

key.name: tray-icons-icon-size
key.description: Size of each tray icon (14–24 px)

key.name: tray-icons-attention-timeout
key.description: Seconds before auto-collapsing after a NeedsAttention notification

key.name: tray-icons-dedup-bg-apps
key.summary: Hide background app when SNI icon is present
key.description: When enabled, background app icons are removed from the tray if the same app has an SNI tray icon

key.name: tray-icons-hide-bg-quick-settings
key.summary: Hide Background Apps from Quick Settings panel
key.description: When enabled, the Background Apps section is hidden from the Quick Settings dropdown

key.name: tray-icons-recolor-symbolic-pixmaps
key.description: Automatically recolor monochrome SNI tray pixmaps to match the current panel theme

key.name: module-clipboard-history
key.description: Searchable clipboard history with pinning and keyboard navigation

key.name: clipboard-history-shortcut
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to open the clipboard history panel

key.name: clipboard-history-max-items
key.description: Number of non-pinned entries to retain (oldest are dropped when the limit is reached)

key.name: clipboard-history-poll-interval
key.description: How often to check the clipboard for new content in milliseconds
